zh.lifeSummary: 當Elizabeth Pilkington於大約1423年出生在英國藍卡爾布拉可洛德時，她的父親Edmund Pilkington29歲，母親Elizabeth Booth21歲。她於大約1445年與Sir William Harrington在英國英格蘭諾薩普頓史爾布利沃斯結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1472年9月26日在英國英格蘭諾薩普頓史爾享年50歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Elizabeth Pilkington于大约1423年出生在英国藍卡爾布拉可洛德时，她的父亲Edmund Pilkington29岁，母亲Elizabeth Booth21岁。她于大约1445年与Sir William Harrington在英国英格兰諾薩普頓史爾布利沃斯结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1472年9月26日在英国英格兰諾薩普頓史爾享年50岁。

nameMeanings.name: Pilkington
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (northwestern): habitational name from a place in Lancashire. The placename may derive from an Old English personal name Pīleca or Pīloc + patronymic -ing + Old English tūn ‘farmstead, estate’. The surname is established in Ireland, where its presence was first recorded in the early 15th century.

nameMeanings.name: Elizabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

variants.name: Elisabeth
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Elizabeth Pilkington was born about 1423, in Blackrod, Lancashire, England, her father, Edmund Pilkington, was 29 and her mother, Elizabeth Booth, was 21. She married Sir William Harrington about 1445, in Brixworth, Northamptonshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. She died on 26 September 1472, in Northamptonshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 50.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Elizabeth Pilkington est née environ 1423, à Blackrod, Lancashire, Angleterre, son père, Edmund Pilkington, avait 29 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Booth, avait 21 ans. Elle a épousé Sir William Harrington environ 1445, à Brixworth, Northamptonshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée le 26 septembre 1472, à Northamptonshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 50 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Elizabeth Pilkington um 1423 in Blackrod, Lancashire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Edmund Pilkington 29 und ihre Mutter Elizabeth Booth 21. Sie hat um 1445 in Brixworth, Northamptonshire, England, United Kingdom Sir William Harrington geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb am 26. September 1472 im Alter von 50 Jahren in Northamptonshire, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth Pilkington è nata il circa 1423 nel Blackrod, Lancashire, England, sua padre, Edmund Pilkington, aveva 29 anni e sua madre, Elizabeth Booth, aveva 21 anni. Lei sposato Sir William Harrington circa 1445, nel Brixworth, Northamptonshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia. Morì il 26 settembre 1472, nel Northamptonshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 50 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Pilkingtonが約1423年にイギリスランカシュアイアブラクロドで生まれた時，父Edmund Pilkingtonは29歳，母Elizabeth Boothは21歳であった。約1445年にイギリスイギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアブリクスウオルスでSir William Harringtonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1472年9月26日にイギリスイギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアで50歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Pilkington(이)가 대략 1423년 영국 랭카실르 블랙로드에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Edmund Pilkington(은)는 29세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Elizabeth Booth(은)는 21세였다. 그녀는 대략 1445년 영국 잉글랜드 노르섬프토실르 브리스워스에서 Sir William Harrington(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1472년 9월 26일 영국 잉글랜드 노르섬프토실르에서 50세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth Pilkington nasceu aproximadamente 1423, em Blackrod, Lancashire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Edmund Pilkington, tinha 29 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth Booth, tinha 21 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir William Harrington aproximadamente 1445, em Brixworth, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 26 de setembro de 1472, em Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 50 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Elizabeth Pilkington родилась около 1423 г. в местности блэккрод, ланкашир, Англия, её отцу по имени Edmund Pilkington было 29 лет, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Booth, 21. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir William Harrington около 1445 г. в местности бриксворт, нортамптоншир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь. Она умерла 26 сентября 1472 г. в местности нортамптоншир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 50 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Elizabeth Pilkington nació aproximadamente 1423, en Blackrod, Lancashire, Inglaterra, su papá, Edmund Pilkington, tenía 29 años y su mamá, Elizabeth Booth, tenía 21 años. Se casó con Sir William Harrington aproximadamente 1445, en Brixworth, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 1 hija. Murió el 26 de septiembre de 1472, en Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 50 años.
